description_long: This is a low-top, casual sneaker with a minimalist design, featuring a smooth, unadorned upper and a rounded toe box. The shoe is equipped with a standard lace-up closure, using flat laces threaded through six pairs of eyelets. The sole is thick and flat, providing a sturdy base, and the heel area includes a subtle pull tab for easier wearing. The overall silhouette is sleek and modern, with clean lines and no visible branding or decorative elements. The material appears to be synthetic leather or coated fabric, giving it a uniform matte white finish. The shoe is in pristine, unworn condition, with no visible scuffs, dirt, or creasing.
description: A minimalist, low-top white sneaker with a smooth upper, flat laces, and a thick sole, in pristine condition.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the lace-up closure, smooth upper, and heel tab.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe box, symmetrical lacing, and clean vamp.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the profile of view 0 with visible heel tab and sole.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the heel tab, back seam, and the interior opening of the shoe.
